parties_involved: VENDOR: Smt.K.P.DAYANANDINI, D/o.K.M.Prabhakara Reddy, and member of M/s.DAYA ASSOCIATES
PURCHASER: AZIM PREMJI TRUST, represented by its Trustee Azim Premji Trustee Company Private Limited, represented by Mr.V.R.GANESH, S/o.Mr.V.S.Ramachandran
property_details: Property Type: Duly converted from Agricultural to Industrial purposes
Location: Boorgunte Village, Sarjapura Hobli, Anekal Taluk, Bangalore Urban District
Conversion Order: No.ALN(A)(SH)SR:50/11-12 by the Deputy Commissioner, Bangalore District
Boundaries: EAST by Lands in Sy.No.67 and 68; WEST by Road; NORTH by Lands in Sy.No.66; SOUTH by Lands in Sy.No.64.
key_dates: 18-07-2005: Vendor acquired the property via registered Sale Deed (No.ANK-1-02056-2007-08)
25-05-1979: Land Tribunal order in No.LRF.ATC.1574/75-76 granting partial occupancy rights to Sri.Rama Reddy
09-11-1983: Hon'ble High Court of Karnataka order in W.P.No.8175/1979 remanding the matter back to the Land Tribunal
21-10-1998: Land Tribunal order granting entire occupancy right to the legal heirs of Late.Sri.Rama Reddy
22-06-1999: Hon'ble High Court of Karnataka order in W.P.No.42146/1995 dismissing writ petition and confirming the Land Tribunal's order
19-09-2001: Date of two separate general powers of attorney
08-09-2011: Deputy Commissioner's order for land conversion (No.ALN(A)(SH)SR:50/11-12)
summary: This document is an Absolute Sale Deed executed on October 12, 2011, in Sarjapura, Bangalore. It records the sale of a property by the Vendor, Smt.K.P.DAYANANDINI, to the Purchaser, AZIM PREMJI TRUST, represented by Mr.V.R.GANESH. The property in question is 3 Acres and 26 guntas of land in Sy.No.65, located in Boorgunte Village, Anekal Taluk, which has been converted from agricultural to industrial use. The document traces the property's title, originating from a grant of occupancy rights to the heirs of Sri.Rama Reddy by the Land Tribunal, which was confirmed by the High Court of Karnataka. The Vendor acquired the property from these heirs on July 18, 2005. For a total sale consideration of Rs.2,71,92,500/-, which the Vendor acknowledges as fully received, she transfers all her rights, title, and interest in the property to the Purchaser absolutely and forever. The Vendor has delivered vacant possession and assures the property is free from all encumbrances, litigation, and claims.
